title: Context Scope
description: Defines what context can be accessed, by whom, for what purpose, and under what constraints.

version.description: Version of this context scope definition.

description.description: Public-safe description of the context boundary.

data_classification.description: Highest expected classification of context exposed through this scope.

allowed_purposes.description: Approved business purposes for this context.

allowed_agents.description: Agent IDs allowed to request this scope when policy allows.

allowed_skills.description: Skill IDs allowed to request this scope when policy allows.

source_systems.description: System IDs that can provide this context.

constraints.description: Access, retention, redaction, or purpose constraints.

consent_required.description: Whether user or business consent is required before access.

audit_required.description: Whether context access must emit audit evidence.
